key_insight: Adding SageMath to an LLM agent significantly improves research-level math problem solving by providing verifiable computational feedback during reasoning.
engineering_relevance: This shows that CAS-augmented agent workflows can boost accuracy and efficiency for computational mathematics tasks, especially when paired with current documentation access.
method: ReAct-style LLM agent with SageMath tool access for step-by-step computation and verification
Context7 used to retrieve up-to-date documentation during problem solving
Evaluated across frontier models on the RealMath benchmark with a refined multi-step extraction and validation pipeline
evidence_signal: Across the evaluated models, SageMath access improved performance by 9.7 percentage points on average, with gains ranging from 1.5 to 27.8 points; GPT-5.5 reached 75.2% solve rate.
watch_item: Results depend on the quality of tool integration and benchmark post-processing, so gains may not transfer directly to settings with weaker tool support or different problem distributions.
paper_title: Evaluating SageMath-Augmented LLM Agents for Computational and Experimental Mathematics
